canonical_driver_context.summary: Sentiment captures whether the crowd’s tone, optimism, fear, or enthusiasm is amplifying or suppressing prices, expectations, and interpretation beyond hard fundamentals.
Reliability captures whether performance, infrastructure, or execution holds up consistently under normal and stressful conditions.
Product-launches captures how new releases, versions, features, or packaging changes alter perception, adoption, competition, and pricing.
Performance captures the repeatable on-field or on-court quality that actually drives results beyond raw narrative, reputation, or one-off variance.
Operational-risk captures whether execution failures, outages, controls problems, logistical breakdowns, or internal process weaknesses can materially disrupt outcomes.
Macro captures the broad growth, inflation, rates, labor, and financial-conditions environment that shapes many seemingly separate markets at once.
